name: mise + persistent Claude Code
description: A dev container preloaded with mise, git, gh, and Claude Code, where Claude's login session, history, and memory persist across container rebuilds via a named volume.

imageVariant.description: Base image variant (Microsoft dev container base images; all use the 'vscode' user)

installZsh.description: Install zsh and the starship prompt

claudeCodeVersion.description: Claude Code version to install (stable, latest, or a pinned x.y.z)
